<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Painel de Despesas Parlamentares - ALECE 2025</title>
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#0f1420; --panel:#161c2c; --panel2:#1c2333; --border:#2a3348;
    --text:#e8ecf5; --muted:#8b93a7; --accent:#4f8cff; --accent2:#7c5cff;
    --good:#3ecf8e; --warn:#ffb454; --danger:#ff6b6b; --radius:14px;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  body{
    margin:0; font-family:'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
    background:radial-gradient(1200px 600px at 10% -10%, #1a2440 0%, var(--bg) 55%);
    color:var(--text); min-height:100vh;
  }
  header{
    padding:28px 32px 18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    background:linear-gradient(120deg, rgba(79,140,255,.12), rgba(124,92,255,.08));
  }
  header h1{margin:0 0 4px; font-size:1.6rem; letter-spacing:.3px;}
  header p{margin:0; color:var(--muted); font-size:.92rem;}

  .wrap{padding:24px 32px 60px; max-width:1500px; margin:0 auto;}

  .kpis{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(190px,1fr)); gap:14px; margin-bottom:22px;}
  .kpi{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:16px 18px; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .kpi::before{content:""; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(79,140,255,.08), transparent 60%);}
  .kpi span{display:block; color:var(--muted); font-size:.78rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.6px; margin-bottom:6px;}
  .kpi strong{font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:700;}

  .layout{display:grid; grid-template-columns:280px 1fr; gap:20px; align-items:start;}
  @media (max-width:980px){ .layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }

  .filters{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:18px; position:sticky; top:16px; max-height:calc(100vh - 32px); overflow:auto;
  }
  .filters h3{margin:0 0 10px; font-size:.95rem; color:var(--text); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;}
  .filter-group{margin-bottom:18px;}
  .filter-group label.title{display:block; font-size:.78rem; color:var(--muted); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.5px; margin-bottom:8px;}
  select, input[type="text"]{
    width:100%; padding:9px 10px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid var(--border);
    background:var(--panel2); color:var(--text); font-size:.88rem; outline:none;
  }
  select:focus, input[type="text"]:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
  .search-box{margin-bottom:8px;}
  .checkbox-list{
    max-height:220px; overflow-y:auto; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px;
    padding:8px; background:var(--panel2);
  }
  .checkbox-list label{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:5px 4px; font-size:.85rem;
    border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer;
  }
  .checkbox-list label:hover{background:rgba(79,140,255,.1);}
  .checkbox-list input{accent-color:var(--accent); cursor:pointer;}
  .quick-btns{display:flex; gap:6px; margin-top:8px;}
  .quick-btns button{
    flex:1; background:var(--panel2); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--muted);
    padding:6px 4px; border-radius:6px; font-size:.75rem; cursor:pointer;
  }
  .quick-btns button:hover{border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--text);}
  .reset-btn{
    width:100%; margin-top:6px; padding:10px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid var(--danger);
    background:rgba(255,107,107,.08); color:var(--danger); font-size:.85rem; cursor:pointer; font-weight:600;
  }
  .reset-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,107,107,.18);}

  .main{display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:20px;}
  .charts-row{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:20px;}
  @media (max-width:1200px){ .charts-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }

  .card{
    background:var(--panel); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:18px;
  }
  .card h3{margin:0 0 4px; font-size:1rem;}
  .card .sub{color:var(--muted); font-size:.8rem; margin-bottom:12px;}
  .chart-box{position:relative; height:340px;}
  .chart-box.tall{height:320px;}

  .donut-wrap{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:18px; height:100%;}
  .donut-wrap svg{flex-shrink:0;}
  .legend{display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; overflow-y:auto; max-height:100%; flex:1; min-width:0;}
  .legend-item{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; font-size:.8rem;}
  .legend-swatch{width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:3px; flex-shrink:0;}
  .legend-label{color:var(--text); white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; flex:1;}
  .legend-val{color:var(--muted); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; flex-shrink:0;}
  .line-chart-wrap{width:100%; height:100%;}
  .line-chart-wrap svg{width:100%; height:100%;}

  table{width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:.83rem;}
  thead th{
    text-align:left; padding:10px 8px; color:var(--muted); font-weight:600; font-size:.72rem;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.4px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    position:sticky; top:0; background:var(--panel); cursor:pointer; user-select:none;
  }
  thead th:hover{color:var(--text);}
  tbody td{padding:9px 8px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04); vertical-align:top;}
  tbody tr:hover{background:rgba(79,140,255,.06);}
  .val-cell{text-align:right; font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; color:var(--good); font-weight:600; white-space:nowrap;}
  .desc-cell{max-width:340px; color:var(--muted); font-size:.78rem; line-height:1.3;}
  .table-wrap{max-height:600px; overflow:auto; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:10px;}
  .table-header-row{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px;}
  .table-count{color:var(--muted); font-size:.82rem;}
  .pagination{display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-end; margin-top:12px; font-size:.82rem; color:var(--muted);}
  .pagination button{
    background:var(--panel2); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text);
    padding:6px 12px; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer; font-size:.8rem;
  }
  .pagination button:disabled{opacity:.4; cursor:not-allowed;}
  .pagination button:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:var(--accent);}

  .badge{
    display:inline-block; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:20px; background:rgba(79,140,255,.15);
    color:var(--accent); font-size:.72rem; font-weight:600;
  }
  .empty-state{padding:40px; text-align:center; color:var(--muted);}
  ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:9px; height:9px;}
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#333d55; border-radius:10px;}
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <h1>💰 Painel de Despesas Parlamentares — ALECE 2025</h1>
  <p>Visualização interativa das despesas de gabinete por Deputado, Mês/Ano e Credor</p>
</header>

<div class="wrap">

  <div class="kpis" id="kpis"></div>

  <div class="layout">
    <!-- FILTERS -->
    <aside class="filters">
      <h3>🔎 Filtros</h3>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label class="title">Deputado</label>
        <select id="filterDeputado">
          <option value="">Todos os deputados</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label class="title">Credor</label>
        <div class="search-box">
          <input type="text" id="credorSearch" placeholder="Buscar credor...">
        </div>
        <select id="filterCredor">
          <option value="">Todos os credores</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="filter-group">
        <label class="title">Mês / Ano (múltipla escolha)</label>
        <div class="checkbox-list" id="mesCheckboxList"></div>
        <div class="quick-btns">
          <button id="selectAllMeses" type="button">Marcar todos</button>
          <button id="clearAllMeses" type="button">Limpar</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="reset-btn" id="resetFilters" type="button">✕ Limpar todos os filtros</button>
    </aside>

    <!-- MAIN -->
    <div class="main">

      <div class="charts-row">
        <div class="card">
          <h3>Top 10 Despesas por Deputado</h3>
          <div class="sub">Soma dos valores no período filtrado</div>
          <div class="chart-box" id="chartDeputado"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="card">
          <h3>Top 10 Despesas por Credor</h3>
          <div class="sub">Soma dos valores no período filtrado</div>
          <div class="chart-box" id="chartCredor"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card">
        <h3>Evolução Mensal das Despesas</h3>
        <div class="sub">Total gasto por mês (considerando filtros ativos)</div>
        <div class="chart-box tall" id="chartEvolucao"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="card">
        <div class="table-header-row">
          <div>
            <h3 style="margin-bottom:2px;">📋 Listagem de Despesas</h3>
            <div class="table-count" id="tableCount"></div>
          </div>
          <input type="text" id="tableSearch" placeholder="Buscar na tabela (descrição, empenho, CNPJ...)" style="max-width:320px;">
        </div>
        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table>
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th data-key="deputado">Deputado</th>
                <th data-key="periodo">Mês/Ano</th>
                <th data-key="empenho">Empenho</th>
                <th data-key="descricao">Descrição</th>
                <th data-key="credor">Credor</th>
                <th data-key="valor" style="text-align:right;">Valor (R$)</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id="tableBody"></tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
        <div class="pagination" id="pagination"></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>

const MONTH_ORDER = {"jan/25":1,"fev/25":2,"mar/25":3,"abr/25":4,"mai/25":5,"jun/25":6,
                      "jul/25":7,"ago/25":8,"set/25":9,"out/25":10,"nov/25":11,"dez/25":12};
const MONTH_LABELS = {"jan/25":"Jan/25","fev/25":"Fev/25","mar/25":"Mar/25","abr/25":"Abr/25",
                       "mai/25":"Mai/25","jun/25":"Jun/25","jul/25":"Jul/25","ago/25":"Ago/25",
                       "set/25":"Set/25","out/25":"Out/25","nov/25":"Nov/25","dez/25":"Dez/25"};

function fmtBRL(v){
  return v.toLocaleString('pt-BR', {style:'currency', currency:'BRL'});
}
function titleCase(s){
  return s.replace(/DEP\s+/i,'').split(' ').map(w => w.length>2 ? w.charAt(0)+w.slice(1).toLowerCase() : w.toLowerCase()).join(' ');
}

// ---------- Build filter option sources ----------
const deputados = [...new Set(RAW_DATA.map(d=>d.deputado))].sort();
const credores = [...new Set(RAW_DATA.map(d=>d.credor))].sort();
const meses = [...new Set(RAW_DATA.map(d=>d.periodo))].sort((a,b)=>MONTH_ORDER[a]-MONTH_ORDER[b]);

const selDeputado = document.getElementById('filterDeputado');
deputados.forEach(dep=>{
  const opt = document.createElement('option');
  opt.value = dep; opt.textContent = titleCase(dep);
  selDeputado.appendChild(opt);
});

const selCredor = document.getElementById('filterCredor');
function populateCredorSelect(filterText=''){
  const current = selCredor.value;
  selCredor.innerHTML = '<option value="">Todos os credores</option>';
  credores.filter(c => c.toLowerCase().includes(filterText.toLowerCase())).forEach(c=>{
    const opt = document.createElement('option');
    opt.value = c; opt.textContent = c;
    selCredor.appendChild(opt);
  });
  if([...selCredor.options].some(o=>o.value===current)) selCredor.value = current;
}
populateCredorSelect();

const mesList = document.getElementById('mesCheckboxList');
meses.forEach(m=>{
  const label = document.createElement('label');
  label.innerHTML = `<input type="checkbox" class="mesChk" value="${m}" checked> ${MONTH_LABELS[m]}`;
  mesList.appendChild(label);
});

document.getElementById('credorSearch').addEventListener('input', e=> populateCredorSelect(e.target.value));
document.getElementById('selectAllMeses').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
  document.querySelectorAll('.mesChk').forEach(c=>c.checked=true); applyFilters();
});
document.getElementById('clearAllMeses').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
  document.querySelectorAll('.mesChk').forEach(c=>c.checked=false); applyFilters();
});
document.getElementById('resetFilters').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
  selDeputado.value=''; selCredor.value=''; document.getElementById('credorSearch').value='';
  populateCredorSelect();
  document.querySelectorAll('.mesChk').forEach(c=>c.checked=true);
  document.getElementById('tableSearch').value='';
  applyFilters();
});
selDeputado.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
selCredor.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
mesList.addEventListener('change', e=>{ if(e.target.classList.contains('mesChk')) applyFilters(); });
document.getElementById('tableSearch').addEventListener('input', ()=>{ tablePage=1; renderTable(); });

// ---------- Charts (native SVG, no external dependencies) ----------
const PALETTE = ['#4f8cff','#7c5cff','#3ecf8e','#ffb454','#ff6b6b','#37c1ea','#f472b6',
                  '#a3e635','#fb923c','#818cf8'];

function escapeHtml(s){
  return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;');
}

function renderDonutChart(containerId, entries){
  const el = document.getElementById(containerId);
  const total = entries.reduce((s,[,v])=>s+v,0);
  if(total<=0 || entries.length===0){
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state">Sem dados para os filtros atuais.</div>';
    return;
  }
  const size=220, cx=size/2, cy=size/2, r=size/2-6, rInner=r*0.55;
  let angleStart = -90;
  let paths = '';
  entries.forEach(([label,value], i)=>{
    const pct = value/total;
    const angle = pct*360;
    let angleEnd = angleStart + angle;
    if(entries.length===1){ angleEnd = angleStart + 359.999; }
    const large = (angleEnd-angleStart) > 180 ? 1 : 0;
    const rad = d => d*Math.PI/180;
    const x1 = cx + r*Math.cos(rad(angleStart)), y1 = cy + r*Math.sin(rad(angleStart));
    const x2 = cx + r*Math.cos(rad(angleEnd)),   y2 = cy + r*Math.sin(rad(angleEnd));
    const ix1 = cx + rInner*Math.cos(rad(angleEnd)),   iy1 = cy + rInner*Math.sin(rad(angleEnd));
    const ix2 = cx + rInner*Math.cos(rad(angleStart)), iy2 = cy + rInner*Math.sin(rad(angleStart));
    const d = `M ${x1.toFixed(2)} ${y1.toFixed(2)} A ${r} ${r} 0 ${large} 1 ${x2.toFixed(2)} ${y2.toFixed(2)} L ${ix1.toFixed(2)} ${iy1.toFixed(2)} A ${rInner} ${rInner} 0 ${large} 0 ${ix2.toFixed(2)} ${iy2.toFixed(2)} Z`;
    paths += `<path d="${d}" fill="${PALETTE[i % PALETTE.length]}" stroke="#161c2c" stroke-width="2">`
           + `<title>${escapeHtml(label)}: ${escapeHtml(fmtBRL(value))} (${(pct*100).toFixed(1)}%)</title></path>`;
    angleStart = angleEnd;
  });
  const legend = entries.map(([label,value],i)=>{
    const pct = (value/total*100).toFixed(1);
    const shortLabel = label.length>30 ? label.slice(0,28)+'…' : label;
    return `<div class="legend-item">
      <span class="legend-swatch" style="background:${PALETTE[i % PALETTE.length]}"></span>
      <span class="legend-label" title="${escapeHtml(label)}">${escapeHtml(shortLabel)}</span>
      <span class="legend-val">${pct}%</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  el.innerHTML = `<div class="donut-wrap">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 ${size} ${size}" width="${size}" height="${size}">${paths}</svg>
    <div class="legend">${legend}</div>
  </div>`;
}

function renderLineChart(containerId, labels, values){
  const el = document.getElementById(containerId);
  if(values.length===0){
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-state">Sem dados para os filtros atuais.</div>';
    return;
  }
  const w=800, h=280, padL=75, padR=20, padT=20, padB=36;
  const maxV = Math.max(...values, 1) * 1.12;
  const plotW = w-padL-padR, plotH = h-padT-padB;
  const stepX = labels.length>1 ? plotW/(labels.length-1) : 0;
  const points = values.map((v,i)=>{
    const x = padL + (labels.length>1 ? i*stepX : plotW/2);
    const y = padT + plotH - (v/maxV)*plotH;
    return [x,y];
  });
  const linePath = points.map((p,i)=> (i===0?'M':'L')+p[0].toFixed(2)+' '+p[1].toFixed(2)).join(' ');
  const areaPath = linePath + ` L ${points[points.length-1][0].toFixed(2)} ${(padT+plotH).toFixed(2)} L ${points[0][0].toFixed(2)} ${(padT+plotH).toFixed(2)} Z`;

  const gridCount = 4;
  let gridLines = '', yLabels = '';
  for(let g=0; g<=gridCount; g++){
    const val = maxV*(g/gridCount);
    const y = padT+plotH-(val/maxV)*plotH;
    gridLines += `<line x1="${padL}" y1="${y.toFixed(2)}" x2="${w-padR}" y2="${y.toFixed(2)}" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.06)" stroke-width="1"/>`;
    yLabels += `<text x="${padL-10}" y="${(y+4).toFixed(2)}" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" fill="#8b93a7">R$ ${(val/1000).toLocaleString('pt-BR',{maximumFractionDigits:0})}k</text>`;
  }
  const xLabels = labels.map((l,i)=> `<text x="${points[i][0].toFixed(2)}" y="${h-12}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#8b93a7">${escapeHtml(l)}</text>`).join('');
  const dots = points.map((p,i)=> `<circle cx="${p[0].toFixed(2)}" cy="${p[1].toFixed(2)}" r="4" fill="#4f8cff" stroke="#0f1420" stroke-width="2">`
    + `<title>${escapeHtml(labels[i])}: ${escapeHtml(fmtBRL(values[i]))}</title></circle>`).join('');

  el.innerHTML = `<div class="line-chart-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
    <defs><linearGradient id="areaGrad_${containerId}" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4f8cff" stop-opacity="0.35"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4f8cff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient></defs>
    ${gridLines}${yLabels}
    <path d="${areaPath}" fill="url(#areaGrad_${containerId})"/>
    <path d="${linePath}" fill="none" stroke="#4f8cff" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    ${dots}
    ${xLabels}
  </svg></div>`;
}

// ---------- Table state ----------
let filteredData = [];
let tablePage = 1;
const PAGE_SIZE = 50;
let sortKey = null, sortDir = 1;

document.querySelectorAll('thead th[data-key]').forEach(th=>{
  th.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    const key = th.dataset.key;
    if(sortKey === key) sortDir *= -1; else { sortKey = key; sortDir = 1; }
    renderTable();
  });
});

function applyFilters(){
  const dep = selDeputado.value;
  const cred = selCredor.value;
  const checkedMeses = new Set([...document.querySelectorAll('.mesChk:checked')].map(c=>c.value));

  filteredData = RAW_DATA.filter(d=>{
    if(dep && d.deputado !== dep) return false;
    if(cred && d.credor !== cred) return false;
    if(!checkedMeses.has(d.periodo)) return false;
    return true;
  });

  tablePage = 1;
  renderKPIs();
  renderCharts();
  renderTable();
}

function renderKPIs(){
  const total = filteredData.reduce((s,d)=>s+d.valor,0);
  const nDep = new Set(filteredData.map(d=>d.deputado)).size;
  const nCred = new Set(filteredData.map(d=>d.credor)).size;
  const n = filteredData.length;
  const media = n ? total/n : 0;

  document.getElementById('kpis').innerHTML = `
    <div class="kpi"><span>Total de Despesas</span><strong>${fmtBRL(total)}</strong></div>
    <div class="kpi"><span>Nº de Lançamentos</span><strong>${n.toLocaleString('pt-BR')}</strong></div>
    <div class="kpi"><span>Deputados</span><strong>${nDep}</strong></div>
    <div class="kpi"><span>Credores</span><strong>${nCred}</strong></div>
    <div class="kpi"><span>Valor Médio</span><strong>${fmtBRL(media)}</strong></div>
  `;
}

function topN(data, key, n){
  const map = {};
  data.forEach(d=>{ map[d[key]] = (map[d[key]]||0) + d.valor; });
  return Object.entries(map).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,n);
}

function renderCharts(){
  // Top 10 Deputado
  const topDep = topN(filteredData, 'deputado', 10).map(([k,v])=>[titleCase(k), v]);
  renderDonutChart('chartDeputado', topDep);

  // Top 10 Credor
  const topCred = topN(filteredData, 'credor', 10);
  renderDonutChart('chartCredor', topCred);

  // Evolucao mensal
  const byMes = {};
  filteredData.forEach(d=>{ byMes[d.periodo] = (byMes[d.periodo]||0) + d.valor; });
  const activeMeses = meses.filter(m => byMes[m] !== undefined);
  renderLineChart('chartEvolucao', activeMeses.map(m=>MONTH_LABELS[m]), activeMeses.map(m=>byMes[m]));
}

function renderTable(){
  const search = document.getElementById('tableSearch').value.toLowerCase().trim();
  let rows = filteredData;
  if(search){
    rows = rows.filter(d =>
      d.descricao.toLowerCase().includes(search) ||
      d.empenho.toLowerCase().includes(search) ||
      d.cnpj.toLowerCase().includes(search) ||
      d.credor.toLowerCase().includes(search) ||
      d.deputado.toLowerCase().includes(search)
    );
  }

  if(sortKey){
    rows = [...rows].sort((a,b)=>{
      let va = a[sortKey], vb = b[sortKey];
      if(sortKey==='valor'){ return (va-vb)*sortDir; }
      if(sortKey==='periodo'){ return (MONTH_ORDER[va]-MONTH_ORDER[vb])*sortDir; }
      return String(va).localeCompare(String(vb), 'pt-BR')*sortDir;
    });
  }

  document.getElementById('tableCount').textContent = `${rows.length.toLocaleString('pt-BR')} despesa(s) encontrada(s)`;

  const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(rows.length / PAGE_SIZE));
  if(tablePage > totalPages) tablePage = totalPages;
  const start = (tablePage-1)*PAGE_SIZE;
  const pageRows = rows.slice(start, start+PAGE_SIZE);

  const tbody = document.getElementById('tableBody');
  if(pageRows.length === 0){
    tbody.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="6"><div class="empty-state">Nenhuma despesa encontrada com os filtros atuais.</div></td></tr>`;
  } else {
    tbody.innerHTML = pageRows.map(d => `
      <tr>
        <td>${titleCase(d.deputado)}</td>
        <td><span class="badge">${MONTH_LABELS[d.periodo]||d.periodo}</span></td>
        <td>${d.empenho}</td>
        <td class="desc-cell" title="${d.descricao.replace(/"/g,'&quot;')}">${d.descricao.length>110 ? d.descricao.slice(0,108)+'…' : d.descricao}</td>
        <td>${d.credor}</td>
        <td class="val-cell">${fmtBRL(d.valor)}</td>
      </tr>
    `).join('');
  }

  const pag = document.getElementById('pagination');
  pag.innerHTML = `
    <button ${tablePage<=1?'disabled':''} id="prevPage">‹ Anterior</button>
    <span>Página ${tablePage} de ${totalPages}</span>
    <button ${tablePage>=totalPages?'disabled':''} id="nextPage">Próxima ›</button>
  `;
  document.getElementById('prevPage')?.addEventListener('click', ()=>{ tablePage--; renderTable(); });
  document.getElementById('nextPage')?.addEventListener('click', ()=>{ tablePage++; renderTable(); });
}

// initial render
applyFilters();
</script>

</body>
</html>
